tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Run an AgentReady scan of a public URL. Returns the 0-100 score, per-phase findings, and top priorities. Use get_fix_pack for machine-readable fixes.

tools.name: get_fix_pack
tools.description: Scan a public URL and return the Fix Pack: prioritized fixes with stable ids, severity, exact remediation, and acceptance criteria — designed for a coding agent to implement.

tools.name: verify_fixes
tools.description: Re-scan a public URL and diff against a previous Fix Pack: which fix ids resolved, which remain, what the score delta is. Pass the previous fix pack (or at least its fixes[].id list and score).
